name: Zilog Z80 CPU (programmable)
author: Velxio
description: Programmable Zilog Z80 chip — full Z80 ISA including IX/IY, EXX, JR, DJNZ, LDIR, IM 0/1/2. Add a .s/.asm/.hex/.bin file to your project, click Compile, then Run. Same chip, any Z80 program — port your ZX Spectrum demo, write a game, or run Tiny BASIC. 32 KB ROM + 16 KB RAM + 8 LEDs + 8 buttons + UART.
